---
title: "Random effects"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source('../assets/setup.R')
```

**"Random effects" is an umbrella term that covers both [random intercepts](rdint.html){target="_blank"} and [random slopes](rdslp.html){target="_blank"}.**

If we're modelling data which contains [grouping variables](groupstruc.html){target="_blank"} that contribute random variability to the data (see [Data generating process](dgp.html){target="_blank"}), then our model should include random effects.


::: {.callout-caution collapse="true"}
## Shrinkage

lorem ipsum

:::


::: {.callout-caution collapse="true"}
## Pooling

lorem ipsum

:::
